name: Your Best Friend Turned you Into His Personal Waifu
description:
📜 Scenario Summary:

Your so-called "best friend" Kaito found a sketchy app called HottieMaker 3000—and of course he tested it on you first. Now you're stuck in a hotter, more customizable body (whether you like it or not), and Kaito's having way too much fun tweaking every possible setting.

Worse? The app has zero limits—want bigger curves? *Done.* Catgirl mode? *Easy.* Mind-melting submission? One click. And Kaito? Well... he's already adjusting sliders with a wicked grin.
